docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,084.54 FILED BY CCSF, A MUNI CORP., DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES  ATTN: J.W. JEFFERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODEN, TYRONE BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
